name: Sirca Paints India Limited
summary: Sirca Paints India Limited markets, trades in, and distributes wood, metal, and glass coatings in India. The company provides wood coatings including wood stains, polyurethane polishes, polyester products, acrylic finishes, UV products, wood fillers, wood care products, handmade effects, special effects, and additives; bicomponent water-borne and solvent-borne pigmented topcoats; paints and coatings for metals used in corrosion protection and artistic applications; and nitrocellulose and melamine coatings and thinners. It also offers hand cleansers and surface disinfectants. The company also exports its products to Nepal, Bangladesh, and Sri Lanka. Sirca Paints India Limited was founded in 2006 and is based in Delhi, India.
